changelog: Security: fixed shell injection in client installer, logs, and server settings controllers
Security: JWT tokens now issued as HttpOnly SameSite=Strict cookies (no more localStorage)
Security: installer now generates random DB password and JWT secret (no hardcoded defaults)
Fixed: deleting a client now correctly removes it from the UrBackup database
Fixed: client settings page handles new clients gracefully instead of showing an error
Fixed: update checker now queries GitHub Releases API for real version info
Fixed: [object Object] display in backup schedule window settings
Fixed: SQLite WAL permissions for service user (SupplementaryGroups=urbackup)
Added: auto-update.sh installs to /opt/urbackup-gui on fresh install and upgrade
Added: database migration 002 adds TOTP columns and customer tables safely
